Entries.Name: CAB Install Context Menu
Entries.Detail: Adds an Install option to the right-click context menu for .cab archive files.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Install option hidden from CAB context menu
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Adds an Install option to the right-click context menu for .cab archive files.

Entries.Name: Compressed Folder in New Menu
Entries.Detail: Shows or hides the Compressed (zipped) Folder option in the right-click New submenu in File Explorer.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Compressed Folder shown in New context menu
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Shows or hides the Compressed (zipped) Folder option in the right-click New submenu in File Explorer.

Entries.Name: Edit with Clipchamp
Entries.Detail: Shows or hides the Edit with Clipchamp video editor option in the right-click context menu for video files.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Edit with Clipchamp shown in context menu
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Shows or hides the Edit with Clipchamp video editor option in the right-click context menu for video files.

Entries.Name: Edit with Paint
Entries.Detail: Shows or hides the Edit with Paint option in the right-click context menu for image files.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Edit with Paint shown in context menu
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Shows or hides the Edit with Paint option in the right-click context menu for image files.

Entries.Name: Edit with Photos
Entries.Detail: Shows or hides the Edit with Photos option in the right-click context menu for image files.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Edit with Photos shown in context menu
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Shows or hides the Edit with Photos option in the right-click context menu for image files.

Entries.Name: MSI Extract Context Menu
Entries.Detail: Adds an Extract option to the right-click context menu for .msi installer files, letting you browse their contents without running the installer.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Extract option hidden from MSI context menu
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Adds an Extract option to the right-click context menu for .msi installer files, letting you browse their contents without running the installer.

Entries.Name: Multiple Invoke Context Menu
Entries.Detail: When selecting 15 or more files and right-clicking, Windows normally shows a warning before displaying the context menu. This raises or removes that limit.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: When selecting 15 or more files and right-clicking, Windows normally shows a warning before displaying the context menu. This raises or removes that limit.

Entries.Name: Open in Windows Terminal
Entries.Detail: Shows or hides the 'Open in Windows Terminal' option in File Explorer background and folder context menus so you can open the current location directly in Windows Terminal.

Entries.Name: Print CMD Context Menu
Entries.Detail: Shows or hides the Print option in the right-click context menu for .bat and .cmd script files.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Shows or hides the Print option in the right-click context menu for .bat and .cmd script files.

Entries.Name: Store in Open With Dialog
Entries.Description: 'Look for an app in the Microsoft Store' in Open With
Entries.Detail: Shows or hides the Look for an app in the Microsoft Store option that appears in the Open With dialog for unassociated file types.
Entries.WinDefaultDesc: Look for app in Store shown in Open With dialog
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Shows or hides the Look for an app in the Microsoft Store option that appears in the Open With dialog for unassociated file types.

Entries.Name: Windows Terminal as Admin Default
Entries.Description: Open Windows Terminal as admin by default
Entries.Detail: Controls whether the Windows Terminal context menu entry launches with elevation by default when you use the admin variant.
Entries.WhyThisMatters: Open Windows Terminal as admin by default
